blocks.text:
ทำไม neonatologist ต้องเข้าใจ perinatal ultrasound?
เรารับ patient จาก prenatal diagnosis — ถ้าไม่รู้ว่า US บอกอะไร เราจะ prepare ทารกแรกเกิดไม่ได้. สิ่งที่ต้องรู้: (1) Cranial US เป็น tool หลักใน NICU ทุกแห่ง — IVH grading, PVL, PHVD ต้องแปลผลได้เอง; (2) Fetal Doppler ใน FGR กำหนด timing of delivery — AEDV/REDV/DV reversed a-wave = delivery indication; (3) POCUS ใน NICU = pneumothorax, cardiac tamponade, NEC — diagnose ได้ทันทีที่ bedside; (4) NT ≥3.5 mm → fetal echo; double bubble → check T21; placenta accreta risk escalates with each CS; (5) ที่ KCMH: fetal echo ส่ง cardiology ก่อนคลอด → NICU เตรียม PGE1/BAS ทันที.
เป้าหมายการเรียนรู้วันนี้
อธิบาย US physics: piezoelectric effect, frequency-resolution-penetration tradeoff, B/M/Doppler modes, common artifacts
ระบุ first trimester screening: CRL dating ±5–7 days, NT cutoff, combined screening vs cfDNA/NIPT detection rates
อธิบาย anatomy survey 18–22 wk: biometry (BPD/HC/AC/FL/EFW), CNS, cardiac CHD detection rates per view, renal, GI
วิเคราะห์ fetal Doppler FGR: UA Doppler staging → AEDV → REDV → DV reversed a-wave (TRUFFLE delivery trigger)
เปรียบเทียบ AFI vs SDP: cutoffs, reason SDP preferred (Nabhan Cochrane 2008)
ระบุ fetal anomalies + NICU implications: double bubble (30% T21), gastroschisis vs omphalocele, spina bifida, LUTO, ventriculomegaly
อธิบาย fetal echo indications, timing, standard views, ductal-dependent lesion NICU preparation
อธิบาย cranial US NICU: IVH grading Papile 1978, PVHI mechanism, PVL, timing <30 wk
ระบุ POCUS ใน NICU: lung (barcode/seashore/B-lines), cardiac (PDA, tamponade), abdominal (NEC pneumatosis)
เชื่อม placenta pathology (PAS, vasa previa) + cervical length กับ NICU preparation
1. Ultrasound Physics
1.1 Piezoelectric Effect and Modes

rows: Cranial US ทารก, thyroid

blocks.text: B-mode: 2D real-time anatomy
M-mode: single line through time → cardiac rhythm; barcode sign = absent lung sliding = PTX
Pulsed Doppler: velocity waveform at specific site — UA, MCA, DV
Color Doppler: direction + velocity → cardiac flow
Power Doppler: angle-independent flow presence — placenta, renal
1.2 Common Artifacts
Acoustic shadowing: dark area ใต้ calcified structure
Posterior acoustic enhancement: bright area ใต้ fluid — ไม่ใช่ hyperechoic lesion
A-lines: horizontal reverberation จาก pleural line = normal lung หรือ PTX
B-lines: vertical artifacts erasing A-lines = interstitial fluid; confluent = RDS
2. First Trimester — Dating and Aneuploidy Screening
CRL: most accurate dating — ±5–7 days before 12+0 wk; หลัง 14 wk ลดเหลือ ±2–3 wk; เปลี่ยน EDD ตาม CRL ถ้า discrepancy >7 days (<9 wk) (ACOG PB 700, 2022)

NT — เกณฑ์ท่องจำ
NT วัดที่ 11+0–13+6 wk (CRL 45–84 mm). Normal: <3.0 mm. NT ≥3.5 mm → referral fetal echo + genetics consult (CHD risk ↑ ~2.5x แม้ karyotype ปกติ). NT ≥6 mm → high risk aneuploidy, cardiac, hydrops. FMF quality criteria: neutral position, amniotic membrane separate from skin, largest caliper placement.
cfDNA/NIPT ไม่ใช่ diagnostic: positive → ยืนยัน amniocentesis/CVS; PPV ขึ้นกับ prevalence (อายุมาก → PPV สูง)
PAPP-A <0.5 MoM: เพิ่ม risk FGR, preeclampsia, preterm birth → serial growth scan
3. Second Trimester Anatomy Survey — 18–22 Weeks
3.1 Biometry

rows: Outer→inner table, cavum septum pellucidum visible
เปลี่ยนได้ถ้า head shape abnormal
Outer perimeter same plane as BPD
Preferred เมื่อ head shape abnormal
Outer skin, umbilical vein + stomach level
Most sensitive สำหรับ FGR
Short FL: aneuploidy soft marker, skeletal dysplasia

blocks.text: SGA: EFW/AC <10th percentile; FGR = SGA + Doppler evidence of placental insufficiency (ISUOG 2020)
3.2 CNS Assessment
Lateral ventricles: atrium ≤10 mm = normal; 10–15 mm = mild VM; >15 mm = severe; etiologies: T21, ACC, spina bifida, CMV/toxo, idiopathic

Open spina bifida: indirect signs — banana sign (cerebellum pulled posterior) + lemon sign (frontal scalloping); MOMS trial (Adzick NEJM 2011): prenatal repair → VP shunt 40% vs 82%, motor improvement
Dandy-Walker: cystic 4th V + absent vermis + enlarged posterior fossa; Blake's pouch cyst = vermis intact, better prognosis
3.3 Cardiac — CHD Detection Rates

CHD Detection Rate ขึ้นกับ Views ที่ใช้
4-chamber alone: ~40–50%; + LVOT: ~60–70%; + RVOT: ~75–80%; + 3-vessel + 3VT: ~85–90%. Coarctation of aorta = most commonly missed lesion. ISUOG: 4CH + LVOT + RVOT + 3-vessel view อย่างน้อย.
4-CH: AVSD (T21), HLHS, Ebstein's, VSD
LVOT: overriding aorta (TOF), aortic stenosis, DORV
RVOT: pulmonary stenosis/atresia, TGA, truncus arteriosus
3-vessel + 3VT: CoA (small arch), TGA (parallel vessels), right aortic arch
3.4 Abdominal and Renal
Renal pelvis AP: ≥4 mm <28 wk, ≥7 mm ≥28 wk = pyelectasis → postnatal follow-up
Double bubble = duodenal atresia: 30% T21 → genetics consult + karyotype/cfDNA; polyhydramnios ร่วม; NICU: NG tube, NPO, TPN, echo, surgical repair 24–48h
Gastroschisis: right of cord, no membrane, <1% aneuploidy; bowel bag + fluid resus + surgery
Omphalocele: central, membrane; 50% chromosomal (small bowel in sac); Beckwith-Wiedemann (liver) → macroglossia, hypoglycemia
TEF (85% Type C): polyhydramnios + absent stomach; VACTERL: ตรวจ cardiac, renal, spine, limbs; avoid bag-mask

Soft markers ACOG PB 226 (2020): isolated single soft marker + negative cFTS/NIPT = ไม่เพิ่ม risk อย่างมีนัยสำคัญ; ≥2 markers/structural anomaly → MFM + genetics; thickened NF ≥6 mm 2nd trim = strongest (LR ~11x)
4. Fetal Doppler in FGR
4.1 Umbilical Artery Doppler Staging

UA Doppler — Staging mild → severe
1. Elevated PI/RI >95th perc: early; EDF present; weekly Doppler. 2. AEDV: no diastolic flow; mortality ↑ 10–15x; hospitalize + steroids + daily DV; ≥34 wk → deliver. 3. REDV: retrograde — mortality ↑ 30–40x; deliver after steroids ≥28 wk (TRUFFLE 2015). 4. DV absent/reversed a-wave: deliver ≥26 wk regardless; hours to 1–2 days before fetal death.
TRUFFLE (Lees Lancet 2015;385:2162): n=503 early FGR 26–32 wk; DV-guided monitoring → better 2-year neurodevelopment vs CTG alone
ISUOG 2020: EFW <3rd perc = FGR; EFW <10th + UA PI >95th perc หรือ AC crossing ≥2 centiles = FGR
4.2 MCA Doppler — Two Distinct Uses
MCA-PI ลดลง = brain-sparing: vasodilatation; PI <5th perc = abnormal; CPR = MCA-PI / UA-PI: <1.0 = brain-sparing แม้ UA-PI ยังปกติ — useful ใน late-onset FGR (34–40 wk)
MCA-PSV >1.5 MoM = fetal anemia: sensitivity 100%, specificity 88% (Mari NEJM 2000;342:9); ใช้ monitor Rh disease, TAPS, Parvovirus B19 — ต่างจาก MCA-PI
4.3 Ductus Venosus
a-wave forward = normal; absent a-wave = ↑ RV preload; reversed a-wave = RV failure → deliver ≥26 wk
5. Amniotic Fluid and Biophysical Profile
SDP preferred (ACOG, Nabhan Cochrane 2008): AFI → ↑ false-positive oligohydramnios → unnecessary interventions without benefit
Oligohydramnios: PROM (most common), FGR, bilateral renal anomaly, post-dates, NSAIDs
Polyhydramnios: idiopathic 65–70%, GI obstruction, NMD, maternal diabetes, fetal anemia/hydrops
5.2 BPP — 5 Components
Score: 8–10 = normal; 6 = equivocal (repeat 4–6h, deliver ≥36 wk); ≤4 = abnormal → deliver
6. Cervical Length Screening
Normal CL ≥25 mm ที่ 16–24 wk (transvaginal)
CL <25 mm + singleton + no prior PTB: vaginal progesterone 200 mg/night → ลด PTB <28 wk ~45% (Hassan 2011)
Cerclage: prior SPB + CL <25 mm → effective; ไม่แนะนำใน twin (To NEJM 2004;350:1516 — no benefit, ↑ PTB)
7. Renal and Structural Anomalies — NICU Implications

Renal Anomaly Spectrum — Benign ถึง Lethal
Unilateral UPJ obstruction: most common 3–5%; mild resolves; ≥10 mm postnatal → VCUG + MAG3. MCDK unilateral: non-functioning (50% involutes 2 yr); bilateral = lethal. Bilateral renal agenesis (Potter): lethal — severe oligohydramnios, pulmonary hypoplasia, Potter's facies. LUTO (PUV): male; keyhole sign; vesicoamniotic shunting controversial (PLUTO underpowered; favorable urine: Na <100, β2-MG <4 mg/L).
NICU bilateral anomaly: creatinine Day 2–3 (Day 1 = maternal); higher ventilation pressures (pulmonary hypoplasia); nephrology consult
Ventriculomegaly: 10–12 mm = mild; 13–15 = moderate; >15 = severe; MRI fetal = gold standard สำหรับ moderate–severe
8. Fetal Echocardiography
Optimal timing: 18–22 wk (sensitivity >90%)

Ductal-Dependent Lesions — PGE1 พร้อมก่อน Delivery
Left-sided (systemic duct-dependent): HLHS, critical CoA, critical AS, IAA → PGE1 0.01–0.1 mcg/kg/min ทันทีหลังคลอด. Right-sided (pulmonary): pulmonary atresia, critical PS → PGE1. TGA + intact IVS: PGE1 + emergent BAS. TAPVR with obstruction: emergent surgery. KCMH: notify cardiology ก่อนคลอด; echo ภายใน 2h.
9. Cranial Ultrasound ใน NICU
9.1 Standard Views
Coronal (anterior fontanelle): 5 views: frontal horns, cavum SP, foramen Monroe, thalami+3rd V, posterior horns+cerebellum
Sagittal: midsagittal (CC, vermis, 4th V) + parasagittal R/L (lateral ventricle + periventricular WM — PVL)
9.2 IVH Grading — Papile 1978

IVH Grading (Papile J Pediatr 1978;92:529)
Grade I: germinal matrix only; VLBW ~30%. Grade II: IVH <50% volume, no dilation. Grade III: IVH ≥50% + ventricular dilation. Grade IV / PVHI: periventricular hemorrhagic infarction = venous infarction (GM compresses terminal vein) — NOT IVH extension; unilateral: >50% ambulatory; bilateral: poor CP outcome.
<30 wk timing: Day 7, Day 28–30, 36–40 wk CGA; acute symptoms → emergent US; 90% IVH ใน 72h แรก, peak 24–48h
PHVD: serial Levene index + ventricular index + AHW; POINT trial ongoing
9.3 PVL
Cystic PVL: cysts ≥3 mm bilateral → sensitivity 80–90% สำหรับ CP; appear 3–6 wk after insult
MRI 36–40 wk CGA: gold standard สำหรับ WMI characterization และ long-term prediction
Prevention: MgSO₄ <32 wk (ACOG 2018); avoid hypocarbia PaCO₂ <35
10. Point-of-Care Ultrasound (POCUS) ใน NICU
10.1 Lung US (LUS)

LUS Artifacts = Findings ที่ต้องรู้ให้แม่น
A-lines: horizontal reverberation จาก pleural line = normal lung หรือ PTX. B-lines: vertical artifact from pleural line, erase A-lines = interstitial fluid; confluent = RDS/pulmonary edema. Absent lung sliding = PTX until proven otherwise. M-mode: seashore = normal (granular below pleural); barcode = absent sliding = PTX. Lung point: junction absent/present sliding = 100% specific partial PTX. LUS sensitivity/specificity 100%/100% neonatal PTX (Raimondi Pediatrics 2016).

rows: No sliding; barcode M-mode; lung point

blocks.text: 10.2 Cardiac POCUS
Cardiac tamponade: pericardial effusion + diastolic RV collapse → emergent pericardiocentesis
PDA: DA ≥1.5 mm, L→R flow, LA/Ao >1.4, reversed diastolic Ao = hemodynamically significant; POCUS ก่อน indomethacin — rule out ductal-dependent lesion
IVC: collapsibility >50% = volume depleted; dilated non-collapsible = overloaded
10.3 Abdominal POCUS
NEC: pneumatosis (hyperechoic foci bowel wall); portal venous gas; US more sensitive than AXR ใน early pneumatosis
Adrenal hemorrhage: echogenic suprarenal mass; แยกจาก neuroblastoma (calcification, catecholamines)
Renal vein thrombosis: enlarged echogenic kidney + absent Doppler; hematuria + thrombocytopenia
11. Placenta — Critical Findings
Placenta accreta spectrum (Silver 2006): CS1 + previa = 3%; CS2 = 11%; CS3 = 40%; CS4+ = 61%; US features: loss of retroplacental clear space, lacunae, bladder interruption, bridging vessels
NICU PAS: planned delivery 34–36 wk; ทารก preterm ~34–35 wk; antenatal corticosteroids 34–36+6 wk (ALPS)

Vasa previa: fetal vessels over os; undiagnosed mortality >60% vs <3% prenatal diagnosis; NICU: O-negative blood ready; Apt test ถ้าสงสัย vaginal blood = fetal (alkaline denaturation: fetal Hb resistant = pink; maternal Hb denatures = yellow)
12. NICU Practical
FGR + AEDV/REDV: prepare cot + UAC/UVC; hypoglycemia, hypothermia, polycythemia (Hct >65%), RDS; slow enteral ↑ NEC risk — 10–15 ml/kg/day
Bilateral renal anomaly/severe oligohydramnios: pulmonary hypoplasia → higher PIP/MAP; early HFOV; creatinine Day 2–3; nephrology
Cranial US <30 wk: Day 7 + Day 28–30 + 36–40 wk CGA; acute symptoms → emergent
Pneumothorax: LUS ก่อน CXR (faster, no radiation); barcode + absent sliding → needle decompression + chest tube
NEC: abdominal US ≥ AXR sensitivity ใน early disease
Ductal-dependent CHD: PGE1 drawn up ready ก่อน delivery; bedside POCUS ก่อน indomethacin
Fetal hydronephrosis postnatal: mild unilateral: renal US Day 3–5 (หลีก Day 1–2); severe/bilateral: Day 1
Double bubble case: rapid FISH/chromosome ก่อน surgical planning (30% T21 → AV canal comorbidity)
13. 5 Bedside Pearls

PEARL 1 — REDV ≥26 wk = Deliver. AEDV ≠ Deliver Now.
REDV: retrograde diastolic flow — deliver after steroids ≥28 wk (TRUFFLE 2015). DV reversed a-wave = hours to 1–2 days before fetal death. AEDV: GA-dependent — <28 wk: daily DV; 26–34 wk: steroids + daily DV; ≥34 wk: deliver. อย่า confuse AEDV = emergency delivery.

PEARL 2 — IVH Grade IV = PVHI ไม่ใช่ IVH Extension: Prognosis ต่างกัน
PVHI = venous infarction (GM compress terminal vein) — ไม่ใช่ IVH ไหลออก. Unilateral: >50% ambulatory; bilateral: poor. บอก family ตาม laterality ไม่ใช่แค่ 'grade 4'. MRI 36–40 wk CGA = gold standard WMI.

PEARL 3 — MCA-PSV (Anemia) ≠ MCA-PI (FGR Brain-Sparing): คนละ Parameter
MCA-PSV >1.5 MoM = anemia (sensitivity 100%, specificity 88%; Mari NEJM 2000) — Rh disease, TAPS, Parvovirus. MCA-PI ลด = brain-sparing ใน FGR; CPR <1.0 = redistribution แม้ UA ปกติ. NICU: receive hydrops → ถาม prenatal MCA-PSV; prepare blood cross-matched ก่อนคลอด.

PEARL 4 — Barcode Sign = PTX จนกว่าจะพิสูจน์ว่าไม่ใช่
Barcode sign (M-mode all horizontal) = absent lung sliding = PTX. Seashore sign (granular below pleural) = normal. Lung point 100% specific partial PTX. LUS 100%/100% sensitivity/specificity (Raimondi 2016). ใช้ LUS ทุก acute deterioration — เร็วกว่า CXR และไม่มี radiation.

PEARL 5 — Double Bubble: ตรวจ T21 ก่อนผ่าตัด เสมอ
30% duodenal atresia associated with T21. ถ้าไม่มี karyotype prenatal → rapid FISH/chromosome ก่อน surgery เพราะ T21 มี AV canal ที่ต้อง optimize ก่อน repair. NICU: NG tube, NPO, TPN Day 1, echo, genetics consult. Polyhydramnios ร่วม → expect respiratory issues.
14. Evidence Update — 2000–2025
Mari NEJM 2000;342:9: MCA-PSV >1.5 MoM = moderate-severe fetal anemia (sensitivity 100%, specificity 88%) — replaced cordocentesis globally
Papile J Pediatr 1978;92:529: IVH grading I–IV — standard; Grade IV recharacterized as PVHI (venous infarction) — mechanism distinct
Adzick NEJM 2011;364:993 (MOMS): fetal MMC repair: VP shunt 40% vs 82%; motor improvement ~2 grades; mandatory center of excellence
Lees Lancet 2015;385:2162 (TRUFFLE): DV-guided monitoring early FGR → better 2-year neurodevelopment vs CTG; DV reversed a-wave = delivery trigger
Nabhan Cochrane 2008: SDP preferred over AFI — AFI → more false-positive oligohydramnios + unnecessary interventions
Hassan Am J Obstet Gynecol 2011;206:124: vaginal progesterone CL <25 mm singleton: ลด PTB <28 wk ~45%
To NEJM 2004;350:1516: cerclage twin + short CL: no benefit — ไม่แนะนำใน twins
Raimondi Pediatrics 2016;138: LUS PTX neonates: sensitivity 100%, specificity 100% — superior to transillumination
Silver Obstet Gynecol 2006;107:1226: PAS risk: CS3 + previa = 40%; CS4+ = 61%
ACOG PB 226, 2020: isolated EIF + negative cFTS/NIPT: no invasive testing
ISUOG Practice Guidelines FGR 2020: EFW <3rd perc = FGR; DV framework delivery timing
De Vries Pediatrics 2014;134:e1056: ventricular index reference values — PHVD monitoring thresholds
D'Antonio Ultrasound Obstet Gynecol 2013;42:193: PAS: US 77% sensitivity, MRI 88% — combined approach recommended
Brat Chest 2015;148:1026: neonatal LUS score: ≥5/12 = high probability needing surfactant
15. Self-Check Q&A
Q: NT ≥3.5 mm karyotype ปกติ ต้องทำอะไรต่อ?
ตอบ: Referral fetal echocardiography เพราะ CHD risk ↑ ~2.5 เท่า แม้ karyotype normal. NT ≥6 mm → high risk structural anomaly + hydrops → MFM consult + detailed anatomy + genetics.
Q: CHD detection rate เพิ่มอย่างไรเมื่อ add views?
ตอบ: 4-chamber: ~40–50%; + LVOT: ~60–70%; + RVOT: ~75–80%; + 3-vessel + 3VT: ~85–90%. Coarctation of aorta = most commonly missed.
Q: AEDV vs REDV ใน FGR management ต่างกันอย่างไร?
ตอบ: AEDV: GA-dependent; ≥34 wk deliver; 26–34 wk daily DV + steroids. REDV: delivery ≥28 wk (TRUFFLE 2015); DV reversed a-wave = deliver ≥26 wk regardless — hours to fetal death.
Q: AFI vs SDP: อันไหน preferred และทำไม?

ตอบ: SDP preferred (Nabhan Cochrane 2008): AFI → false-positive oligohydramnios → unnecessary interventions without benefit. SDP <2 cm = oligohydramnios; AFI <5 cm = oligohydramnios; SDP ≥2 cm = adequate (ACOG).
Q: IVH Grade IV vs PVHI ต่างกันอย่างไร และ laterality สำคัญอย่างไร?
ตอบ: PVHI = venous infarction (GM compress terminal vein) — ไม่ใช่ IVH extension. Unilateral: >50% ambulatory; bilateral: poor CP outcome. บอก family ตาม laterality ไม่ใช่แค่ 'grade 4'.
Q: Barcode sign กับ seashore sign ต่างกันอย่างไร? lung point คือ?

ตอบ: Seashore sign: granular below pleural line = normal lung sliding. Barcode sign: all horizontal lines = absent sliding = PTX. Lung point: junction absent/present sliding = 100% specific partial PTX. LUS 100%/100% sensitivity/specificity (Raimondi 2016).
Q: MCA-PSV vs MCA-PI: ใช้สำหรับอะไรคนละกรณี?

ตอบ: MCA-PSV >1.5 MoM: fetal anemia (sensitivity 100%; Mari NEJM 2000) — Rh disease, TAPS, Parvovirus. MCA-PI ลด = brain-sparing ใน FGR; CPR = MCA-PI/UA-PI <1.0 = redistribution. คนละ parameter คนละ indication.
Q: Double bubble: anomaly อะไร chromosomal association ที่ต้องรู้?
ตอบ: Duodenal atresia: 30% T21 → genetics consult + karyotype/cfDNA ก่อน surgery. T21 มี AV canal ที่ต้อง optimize. NICU: NG tube, NPO, TPN Day 1, echo, genetics.
Q: Vasa previa: ทำไม undiagnosed mortality สูง?

ตอบ: Fetal vessels over os — ROM → rupture → rapid fetal exsanguination; mortality >60% undiagnosed vs <3% prenatal. NICU: O-negative blood ready; Apt test: fetal Hb resistant alkali → pink; maternal Hb denatures → yellow.
Q: Cranial US: timing protocol สำหรับ <30 wk?

ตอบ: <30 wk: Day 7, Day 28–30, 36–40 wk CGA. Day 7: detect 90% IVH. Day 28–30: evolution + early PVL. 36–40 wk CGA: WMI + ventricular dilation. MRI 36–40 wk = gold standard WMI characterization; acute symptoms → emergent US anytime.
Q: Placenta accreta: US features และ CS risk ขึ้นกับอะไร?

ตอบ: US features: loss of retroplacental clear space, lacunae (Swiss cheese), bladder interruption, bridging vessels. Risk: CS3 + previa = 40%; CS4+ = 61% (Silver 2006). NICU: ทารก preterm ~34–35 wk; antenatal corticosteroids.

Day 108 Preview — Fanaroff Ch.11
บทต่อไป: Chapter 11 — Estimation of Fetal Well-Being (Fanaroff 12th ed.). เตรียมตัว: NST/BPP/modified BPP, UA Doppler staging, MCA Doppler, DV Doppler, Baschat's sequential IUGR deterioration, TRUFFLE, antepartum surveillance indications (ACOG PB 229).
